ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_params" TEXT /* Parameters associated with the task */,
  "task_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the task */,
  "verbose_name" TEXT /* Verbose name of the task */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the task */,
  "run_at" TEXT /* Scheduled run time of the task */,
  "repeat" INTEGER /* Repeat interval of the task */,
  "repeat_until" TEXT /* Deadline for repeating tasks */,
  "queue" TEXT /* Queue assigned to the task */,
  "task_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task type */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker assigned to the task */,
  "queue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the queue assigned to the task */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of task IDs that this task depends on */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task */,
  "last_attempt_time" TEXT /* Time of the last attempt to execute the task */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the task has been retried */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the task */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_task_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_type_id") REFERENCES task_types ("task_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_queue_id FOREIGN KEY ("queue_id") REFERENCES queues ("queue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_types" (
  "task_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "task_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the task type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task type */,
  "max_attempts" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attempts allowed for tasks of this type */,
  "timeout" INTEGER /* Maximum time a task of this type can run before being considered failed */,
  "retry_delay" INTEGER /* Delay between retry attempts for tasks of this type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the task type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the task type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Name of the worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the worker */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the worker */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Last time the worker was seen */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the worker */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queues" (
  "queue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each queue */,
  "queue_name" TEXT /* Name of the queue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the queue */,
  "max_concurrent_tasks" INTEGER /* Maximum number of tasks that can run concurrently in the queue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the queue */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the queue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("queue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_history" (
  "task_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task history entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker who executed the task */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of task execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of task execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of task execution (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if task execution failed */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Attempt number of the task execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the task history entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the task history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_attempts" (
  "task_attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task attempt */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Attempt number */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Time of task attempt */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of task attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Specific error code if the task attempt failed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the task attempt */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the task attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_attempts_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
